title: Types And Variants
description: A Mod that adds more variations to mobs
body:
Bored with normal mobs? Make them a little more interesting with this mod!

This mod adds changes to mob stats to all mobs so that they become a little more interesting.

# Types
> ### Normal
> Normal mob, nothing interesting.
> ### Giants
> 4x Hp, 2x Damage, 1.5x Scale, And knocks back entities when hitting them
> ### Joe
> Joe has bad breath and expels poisonous gas on hit

# Variants
> ### Normal
> Normal mob, nothing interesting.
> ### Tanky
> 1.5x Hp
> ### Fast
> 1.5x Movement speed
> ### Weak
> 0.7x Attack Damage [fist damage]
> ### Frail
> 0.7x Hp
> ### Slow
> 0.7x Movement Speed
> ### Slender
> 50% Chance of dodging attacks
> ### Strange
> Each damage to this mob is fixed at 2 hearts per hit.
> ### Strong
> 1.5x Attack Damage [fist damage]

# Compatibility
- Practically compatible with any mod. [this mod only adds on existing minecraft code]

# Note
- This mod does store extra data under the tag "type" and "variant" 
- This mod was split from [Undead Armies](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-armies)
